query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `creator_scan_leads` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `source` enum('youtube','google_news','reddit','vimeo') NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `url` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
  `channelOrAuthor` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `thumbnail` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL,
  `publishedAt` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `keyword` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `leadStatus` enum('new','reviewing','contacted','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
  `notes` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `savedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);
